contract_meta.enhancement: Fail-fast dependency validation before npm install to prevent GPT-5-mini hallucinations
contract_meta.rationale: GPT-5-mini frequently generates invalid dependency versions (e.g., tailwindcss@^3.5.0 doesn't exist in npm registry), causing installation failures after expensive LLM generation. This wastes tokens and prevents validation of timeout fixes. Industry best practice (npm registry API, semver validation, exact pins) ensures dependencies exist before install. Aligns with consultant recommendation for immediate Phase A-FIX-2 win before Phase 5.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Validate all package.json dependencies exist in npm registry before running npm install, fail fast with structured error on invalid versions
project.scope: Dependency validation module with npm registry API integration, wired into task execution before install step
project.work_profile: Single focused win with unit tests and integration validation
out_of_scope: Alternative package suggestions beyond deprecation warnings

execution_model.verification_strategy: Unit tests with npm registry mock fixtures; integration test with real invalid version; E2E test with GPT-5-mini generation
execution_model.description: Build dependency validator with npm registry API, wire into executeTaskPlan before npm install, validate with real generation run
execution_model.failure_mode: HALT on npm registry API failure or validation logic error

observability.description: Log dependency validation results, registry API calls, deprecation warnings to trace file

tasks.title: Map integration points for dependency validation
tasks.description: Identify exact location in executeTaskPlan where npm install occurs, design validation interface, document current flow
actions: Grep for npm install/ci in src/planning/
Read executeTaskPlan.ts to find install step
validation: Discovery note with code snippets exists
success_criteria: Integration point identified with line numbers

tasks.title: Create dependencyPreflight module with npm registry API
tasks.description: Implement dependency validator that checks npm registry for version existence, handles deprecations, validates semver ranges
actions: Implement fetchPackageMetadata() using npm registry API
Create error types for structured failures

tasks.title: Add unit tests for dependency validation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite with npm registry mock fixtures covering success, 404, deprecated, invalid semver cases

tasks.title: Wire dependency preflight into executeTaskPlan
tasks.description: Integrate validateDependencies() call before npm install step in task execution, fail fast on validation errors
actions: Add validation call before install step
Handle validation errors with structured abort
Log validation results to trace file
Update tests to cover validation path
success_criteria: Invalid deps abort with clear error

tasks.title: Run E2E validation with GPT-5-mini (13testartifact)
tasks.description: Execute new task generation with GPT-5-mini to confirm dependency preflight blocks invalid versions and timeout math works
actions: Run npm run dev in background
Verify successful completion if deps valid

tasks.title: Generate evidence document and mark Phase A complete
tasks.description: Document validation results, timeout behavior, dependency preflight outcomes in evidence markdown
success_criteria: Phase A marked as harden complete
